headline: Tennis Strategy
description: Tennis combines physical skill with strategic thinking. Scoring: 15-30-40-game, 6 games per set (win by 2, tiebreak at 6-6). Strategy: exploit opponent weaknesses, control center of court, serve placement over power, approach net when advantageous. Mental game is as important as physical — managing emotions and momentum.

citation.name: Winning Ugly: Mental Warfare in Tennis (2025)
citation.author: Gilbert B., Jamison S.

citation.name: The Inner Game of Tennis (2025 50th Anniversary)
citation.author: Gallwey W.T.
